top3.sql:
SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name
FROM 
    trans t
JOIN 
    account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    t.date >= '1996-01-01' 
    AND t.date <= '1996-01-31'
    AND t.type = 'withdrawal'
    AND t.operation != 'credit_card'
ORDER BY 
    t.amount DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.type = 'withdrawal'
  AND t.operation != 'credit_card'
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', t.date) = '1996-01'
ORDER BY t.amount DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name
FROM 
    trans t
JOIN 
    account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    t.date >= '1996-01-01' 
    AND t.date <= '1996-01-31'
    AND t.type = 'withdrawal'
    AND t.operation != 'credit_card'
ORDER BY 
    t.amount DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name
FROM trans t
JOIN account a USING (account_id)
JOIN district d USING (district_id)
WHERE t.type = 'withdrawal'
  AND t.operation <> 'credit_card'
  AND t.date >= '1996-01-01'
  AND t.date < '1996-02-01'
ORDER BY t.amount DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name
FROM 
    trans t
JOIN 
    account a USING (account_id)
JOIN 
    district d USING (district_id)
WHERE 
    t.date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-01-31'
    AND t.type = 'withdrawal'
    AND COALESCE(t.operation, '') != 'credit_card'
ORDER BY 
    CAST(t.amount AS REAL) DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name
FROM 
    trans t
JOIN 
    account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    t.date >= '1996-01-01' 
    AND t.date <= '1996-01-31'
    AND t.type = 'withdrawal'
    AND t.operation != 'credit_card'
ORDER BY 
    t.amount DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name
FROM 
    trans t
    INNER JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
    INNER JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    t.date >= '1996-01-01' 
    AND t.date <= '1996-01-31'
    AND t.type = 'withdrawal'
    AND (t.operation IS NULL OR t.operation != 'credit_card')
ORDER BY 
    CAST(t.amount AS REAL) DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name
FROM trans t
JOIN account a USING (account_id)
JOIN district d USING (district_id)
WHERE t.type = 'withdrawal'
  AND t.operation <> 'credit_card'
  AND t.date >= '1996-01-01'
  AND t.date < '1996-02-01'
ORDER BY t.amount DESC
LIMIT 10;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    d.A2 AS district_name
FROM 
    trans t
JOIN 
    account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    t.date >= '1996-01-01' 
    AND t.date <= '1996-01-31'
    AND t.type = 'withdrawal'
    AND t.operation != 'credit_card'
ORDER BY 
    t.amount DESC
LIMIT 10;
